title: session — published events
description: Every event implements ShouldDispatchAfterCommit so listeners never fire against a rolled-back write. Lifecycle events fan out to notifications + activity + audit. SessionCoachReassigned when < 24h before start is critical-audit — parents planned around the coach identity for minor participants. SessionMinorSafeguardingIncident is the top-severity event — every fire generates a mandatory audit row + regulator-facing notification chain.

events.name: SessionScheduled
events.trigger: SessionProvisioner completed a successful create. Fires exactly once per `sessions.id`.

events.name: SessionConfirmed
events.trigger: Session.status transitioned scheduled -> confirmed. Confirmation locks the session for attendees (roster is committed).
consumers: notifications::DispatchSessionScheduledNotification (only if not already fired at scheduled)

events.name: SessionRescheduled
events.trigger: Session.resource_booking_id changed to a new booking (which is how time changes flow — Session doesn't store starts_at/ends_at directly; the booking does). AUDIT-WARN — affects athletes + coach.
consumers: notifications::DispatchSessionRescheduledNotification (cannot-opt-out to registered athletes + coach + guardians for minors)

events.name: SessionCancelled
events.trigger: Session.status transitioned to cancelled. Requires cancellation_reason.

payload.cancelled_by: ULID | null (null = automated cancel from under-minimum job)

events.name: SessionStarted
events.trigger: Session.status transitioned to in_progress. Fires from StartScheduledSessionsJob (every 5 min) at starts_at.

events.name: SessionCompleted
events.trigger: Session.status transitioned in_progress -> completed. Fires from CompleteFinishedSessionsJob at ends_at + 15-minute grace.
consumers: notifications::DispatchSessionRatingRequestNotification (opt-in to athletes + guardians — gated by session_coach_ratings entitlement)

events.name: SessionCoachAssigned
events.trigger: head_coach_id set on session for the first time OR assistant_coach added to array.

events.name: SessionCoachReassigned
events.trigger: head_coach_id changed post-scheduled (was NOT null, now different). AUDIT-CRITICAL when < 24h before session starts_at — parents planned around the coach identity for minor participants. Safeguarding-adjacent.
consumers: notifications::DispatchSessionCoachReassignedNotification (cannot-opt-out to registered athletes + guardians for minors when <24h)

events.name: SessionCurriculumTopicUpdated
events.trigger: curriculum_topic OR lesson_plan_url changed.

events.name: SessionAttendanceCapacityChanged
events.trigger: attendance_capacity OR attendance_min changed.

events.name: SessionAthleteCheckedIn
events.trigger: SessionAttendance.status transitioned registered -> checked_in.

events.name: SessionAthleteMarkedAbsent
events.trigger: SessionAttendance.status transitioned to absent.

events.name: SessionAthleteMarkedLate
events.trigger: SessionAttendance.status transitioned to late (checked in past grace window).

events.name: SessionAthleteRemoved
events.trigger: SessionAttendance soft-deleted.

events.name: SessionAttendanceBelowMinimum
events.trigger: checked_in_athletes_count < attendance_min after session start. Fires from CancelUnderMinimumSessionsJob. Session transitions to cancelled with trigger='automated_under_minimum'.

events.name: SessionRatingReceived
events.trigger: An athlete or guardian submitted a rating for the session. Fires per rating.

events.name: SessionRatingAggregated
events.trigger: AggregateSessionRatingsJob wrote a new session_rating value. Fires at session close (nightly job).
consumers: coaching::UpdateCoachAggregateRating (Wave 2b — the coach.rating aggregator that pulls per-session ratings)

events.name: SessionLessonPlanUpdated
events.trigger: lesson_plan_url changed. Gated by session_lesson_plans entitlement.

events.name: SessionMinorSafeguardingIncident
events.trigger: safeguarding_incident_flag set true on a session where any registered athlete is a minor. TOP-SEVERITY audit event — regulator-facing. Never opt-out.
consumers: audit::WriteToAuditLog (retention: 7 years or 25 years per jurisdiction, critical severity, regulator-flagged)
notifications::DispatchSessionSafeguardingIncidentNotification (cannot-opt-out; to tenant owner + admin + safeguarding officer)

events.name: SessionArchived
events.trigger: Session.status transitioned to archived (soft-delete from a terminal state).

events.name: SessionRestored
events.trigger: Archived -> completed/cancelled. Only within retention window.

events.name: SessionDeleted
events.trigger: Hard-delete via PurgeCompletedSessionsJob (past 7-year retention + no inbound refs) OR platform-support two-person CLI path.
consumers: audit::WriteToAuditLog (retention: 7 years — the audit outlives the row)
